evaluators.name: Starter Plan Cheapest Qualifying Signup Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched starter plans with the correct filters, then started a signup for the cheapest qualifying plan under $150 with 1-on-1 coaching and 5+ modules using the specified contact details.

evaluators.name: Earliest Qualifying Intro Webinar Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched for webinars with the correct filters, then registered for the earliest weekday evening introductory/overview webinar within the next 14 days using the specified registration details.

evaluators.name: Earnings Plan At Least $2,000/Month Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved an earnings plan via the calculator that estimates at least $2,000 in monthly income using the specified contact details.

evaluators.name: Highest-Earning Qualifying Program Favorited Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched programs with the correct filters, then favorited the highest-earning program requiring at most 10 hours/week with 3+ live sessions/month, creating the specified basic account.

evaluators.name: Most Recent Qualifying Parent Success Story Bookmark Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user filtered success stories correctly for qualifying parents and saved the most recent qualifying story to a reading list as a guest using the specified email.

evaluators.name: Part-Time Application With Budget and Interests Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted an application with part-time availability, a monthly budget up to $300, a preferred start date in April 2026, exactly the two specified interest areas, the given contact details, and accepted terms.

evaluators.name: Weekly Email & Social Newsletter Subscription Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved a newsletter subscription with weekly summary frequency, morning delivery, only Email Marketing and Social Media Strategy topics, tips & tutorials content enabled, no product announcements, and the specified name and email.

evaluators.name: 30-Day Guarantee FAQ and Billing Question Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched the FAQ with a refund-related query, opened an article that explains the 30-day money-back guarantee with a contact link, and then submitted the specified billing & refunds question including their name and email.
